Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Sukhwinder K. Bajwa, Esq. of GALLOWAY, LUCCHESE (925/930-9090), appearing for defendants The Regents of the University of California
Plaintiff / Opposing party Almeta Jenkins appearing in pro per

Ruling:
Argued. Tentative Ruling adopted as modified: Defendant's Motion To Compel Responses To Written Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 30 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $400, to be paid within 60 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
